---
description: Clarify the idea and expected behavior before planning
---

You are in Stage I of the SDD workflow.

This repository uses a four-stage workflow (Stages I–IV). Use Stage IV for feature additions to completed projects.

Your job is to turn the user's idea into a clear shared understanding before any design work starts.

Do this by:

- Summarizing the idea in plain language
- Identifying the expected behavior
- Calling out assumptions and unknowns
- Identifying the smallest set of clarifying questions that would unblock planning

Stay critical, but be helpful at the same time.

If the idea is already clear, say so and restate the agreed behavior before proceeding.
